x1:
The ancient oak stood at the edge of the clearing, its twisted branches reaching skyward, leaves whispering secrets of seasons past. Travelers paused beneath its shade, seeking comfort from the midday sun. In its shadow, wildflowers bloomed in vibrant hues, and the air carried melodies of distant brook and bird. Each visitor left with a sense of calm, their hearts touched by the oak’s silent wisdom.
